changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Your password has expired or requires an update. Please set a new password.
changePassword.newPasswordHint: At least 12 characters, including upper/lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters
errors.weakComposition: New password must include upper/lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters
errors.sameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as the current password

changePassword.successToast: Password changed. Please log in again.
